title: Dex-Benchmark: datasets and code to evaluate algorithms for transcriptomics data analysis.
author: Xie Z Chen C Ma'ayan A
content: S-EPMC10638921 PMC10638921 Dex-Benchmark: datasets and code to evaluate algorithms for transcriptomics data analysis. Many tools and algorithms are available for analyzing transcriptomics data. These include algorithms for performing sequence alignment, data normalization and imputation, clustering
